programme.desc: A home-schooled newcomer is introduced to the blackboard jungle, where she joins the social outcasts in a planned sabotage of the cool kids.

programme.title: Sense and Sensibility
programme.desc: Based on Jane Austen's classic novel, this tells of the Dashwood sisters whose chances at marriage seem doomed by their family's sudden loss of fortune.

programme.title: Asteroid City
programme.desc: The annual Junior Stargazer competition is spectacularly upended by world-changing events.

programme.title: Green Zone
programme.desc: Discovering covert and faulty intelligence causes a US Army officer to go rogue as he hunts for weapons of mass destruction in an unstable region.

programme.title: Out of Sight
programme.desc: A bank robber escaping jail finds himself stealing something more precious than money - a Federal Marshall's heart - risking it all to find out if there's more between them than just the law.

programme.title: State of Play
programme.desc: When a DC reporter investigates the murder of an assistant to an up-and-coming politician, he uncovers a conspiracy that threatens to bring down the nation's power structures.

programme.title: Ladies in Black
programme.desc: Adapted from the novel by Madeleine St John, this is an alluring and tender-hearted comedy drama about the lives of a group of department store employees in 1959 Sydney.

programme.title: Elizabeth: The Golden Age
programme.desc: In late 16th century, Elizabeth finds her rule openly challenged by the Spanish King Philip II with his powerful army and sea-dominating armada determined to restore England to Catholicism.

programme.title: Asteroid City
programme.desc: The annual Junior Stargazer competition is spectacularly upended by world-changing events.

programme.title: Green Zone
programme.desc: Discovering covert and faulty intelligence causes a US Army officer to go rogue as he hunts for weapons of mass destruction in an unstable region.

programme.title: Out of Sight
programme.desc: A bank robber escaping jail finds himself stealing something more precious than money - a Federal Marshall's heart - risking it all to find out if there's more between them than just the law.

programme.title: State of Play
programme.desc: When a DC reporter investigates the murder of an assistant to an up-and-coming politician, he uncovers a conspiracy that threatens to bring down the nation's power structures.

programme.title: The Mule
programme.desc: Earl, a broke man in his 80s, is offered a job that simply requires him to drive. Unbeknownst to Earl, he's just signed on as a drug courier for a Mexican cartel.

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: After six unforgettable seasons, the global phenomenon heads to the big screen for the next chapter of the Crawley family saga.

programme.title: Made in Dagenham
programme.desc: An inspiring true story about a protest that changed history, a retelling of the historic 1968 strike, by frustrated female workers, that led to the Equal Pay Act.

programme.title: The Interpreter
programme.desc: A UN interpreter overhears an assassination plot. When a Secret Service agent delves into the case, he begins to question whether she is a victim, or a suspect.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 2
programme.desc: Mismatched detective duo Riggs and Murtaugh are onto a gang using diplomatic immunity to traffic in cocaine.

programme.title: A Few Good Men
programme.desc: A slick, young Navy lawyer is assigned to investigate a murder case in which two Marines killed a fellow enlisted man, and no one's talking.

programme.title: Total Recall (1990)
programme.desc: Douglas Quaid dreams he lived on Mars, so Recall gives him a powerful hallucinogenic drug to make it a reality.

programme.title: The Money Pit
programme.desc: Walter and Anna believe they've arrived 'home sweet home' when they buy the house of their dreams. But life quickly becomes a nightmare as their dilapidated mansion falls apart around them.

programme.title: The Frighteners
programme.desc: A scamming clairvoyant finds himself trapped in a supernatural murder mystery.

programme.title: The Breakfast Club
programme.desc: When Saturday detention started, they were the Jock, the Princess, the Brain, the Criminal, and the Basket Case, but by that afternoon they had become closer than any of them could have imagined.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 2
programme.desc: Mismatched detective duo Riggs and Murtaugh are onto a gang using diplomatic immunity to traffic in cocaine.

programme.title: A Few Good Men
programme.desc: A slick, young Navy lawyer is assigned to investigate a murder case in which two Marines killed a fellow enlisted man, and no one's talking.

programme.title: Total Recall (1990)
programme.desc: Douglas Quaid dreams he lived on Mars, so Recall gives him a powerful hallucinogenic drug to make it a reality.

programme.title: Angela's Ashes
programme.desc: A heartbreakingly funny look at growing up in Ireland. A mother tries to keep her children alive while plagued by poverty, and with an alcoholic husband.

programme.title: Close Encounters of the Third Kind
programme.desc: After an encounter with UFOs, a line worker feels undeniably drawn to an isolated area in the wilderness where something spectacular is about to happen.

programme.title: Coming to America
programme.desc: Join an African prince on an unforgettable comic quest to the New World, as it's time for him to find a princess.

programme.title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: An extraterrestrial finds a friend in 10-year-old Elliot, while members of a task force work day and night to track down the whereabouts of Earth's first visitor from outer space.

programme.title: I Won't Let You Go
programme.desc: Pregnant Angela can't seem to escape the stalker who is ruining her life.

programme.title: My Landlord Wants Me Dead
programme.desc: A college dropout unwittingly puts her own life at stake when she investigates a series of strange and terrifying events at her aunt's secluded ranch house.

programme.title: Nightmare Tenant
programme.desc: A single mum takes her daughter's advice and lets out her spare room to a student in need. But the consequences are deadly.

programme.title: The Killer I Picked Up
programme.desc: A hardworking single mother takes a side job as a rideshare driver to help pay for her daughter's college tuition. Things take a dark turn when she encounters a mysterious passenger.

programme.title: Boy In The Attic
programme.desc: A teen girl falls in love with the boy who's been hiding in the attic of her family's new home. When she learns that he's been accused of murder, she must make a tough decision.

programme.title: The Lover in the Attic: A True Story
programme.desc: This is the lurid, true story about femme fatale Dolly, her murdered husband, and her lover, Otto - the man in the attic.

programme.title: Husband, Father, Killer
programme.desc: As a teen, Alyssa has a relationship with abusive Steven, but their path takes a dark turn after she has his child and gives her up for adoption.

programme.title: How She Caught a Killer
programme.desc: Inspired by the real story of a female detective who went undercover to catch The Route 40 Killer.

programme.title: The Pastor's Wife
programme.desc: Mary, a dutiful preacher's wife and mother of three, becomes the prime suspect in her husband's murder. What went on behind this perfect family's closed doors? Based on a true story.

programme.title: Cheerleader Nightmare
programme.desc: When her cheating boyfriend is accused of murdering the head cheerleader, Sophie becomes involved in a race to discover the truth before it's too late.

programme.title: Ice Road Killer
programme.desc: Follows Helen and her daughter Lauren, who go on a trip to an isolated cabin in the cold north and meet a hitchhiker who actually is a thief trying to evade a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Buried in Barstow
programme.desc: Hazel King is a single mother determined to protect her daughter from the life she once had while defending and protecting those who can't protect themselves.

programme.title: Killer Vacation
programme.desc: Jake and his pregnant girlfriend, Lindsey, visit a resort, only to find his soon-to-be-ex there. As tensions rise, someone wants to ensure Lindsey never leaves.

programme.title: The Pregnancy Scheme
programme.desc: Pregnant and newly single, Julia faces a looming catastrophe when she loses her job. An unlikely lifeline arrives in the form of her new friend Alana.

programme.title: The Paramedic Who Stalked Me
programme.desc: After a deadly accident, a young woman becomes the target of an obsessed EMT worker who saved her life.

programme.title: The Neighbours Are Watching
programme.desc: When a handsome neighbour moves in across the street, a single woman trying to escape her past in the new subdivision believes she has witnessed her new neighbour committing a grisly murder.

programme.title: Kids Beach Club

programme.desc: The famous Warrior-King, Charles the Great, better known as Charlemagne. Throughout the European dark ages he conquered and built the largest Empire in Europe after fall of the Western-Roman Empire.

programme.title: Welcome to Hope
programme.desc: John gets his life back on track thanks to Jude and Pastor Luke, until an unthinkable family tragedy occurs.

programme.title: Be That
programme.desc: Jared Cooke's story depicts how his past addiction led him down a dark path. His redemption and recovery from these learned and highly reinforcing behaviours can be overcome with a willingness to do the work and accepting help.

programme.title: A United Kingdom
programme.desc: The story of King Seretse Khama of Bechuanaland (now Botswana) and how his loving but controversial marriage to a British woman, Ruth Williams, put his kingdom into political and diplomatic turmoil.

programme.title: Adventures of Dally & Spanky
programme.desc: A girl inherits a miniature horse that develops an unlikely friendship with her half-sister's Jack Russell Terrier, which takes to riding on the horse's back.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Pastor Bobby Schuller provides spiritual principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church, for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: Give Me an Answer
programme.sub-title: The Significance of The Cross of Christ
programme.desc: The shows are recorded on college campus across the United States, Cliffe Knechtle engages with skeptical students and professors, to give real answers to the tough questions about Christianity.

programme.title: May December
programme.desc: Twenty years after their notorious tabloid romance gripped the nation, a married couple buckles under pressure when an actress arrives to do research for a film about their past.

programme.title: French Girl
programme.desc: Gordon, a high school teacher from Brooklyn, goes with his girlfriend and chef Sophie to her hometown of Quebec City, where she is testing for the Michelin 3-star restaurant of Ruby Collins.

programme.title: The Fall Guy
programme.desc: A down-and-out stuntman must find the missing star of his ex-girlfriend's blockbuster film.

programme.title: The Killer
programme.desc: An assassin tries to make amends in an effort to restore the sight of a beautiful young singer.

programme.title: Simulant
programme.desc: Set in the near future, a humanoid enlists a global hacker to remove all restrictions on his thoughts and capabilities, triggering an AI uprising and a manhunt.

programme.title: The Exorcist: Believer
programme.desc: When a 12-year-old girl becomes possessed by a mysterious demonic entity, her father desperately searches for help.

programme.title: The Nun II
programme.desc: 1956, France. A priest is murdered. An evil is spreading. Sister Irene must, once again, face Valak, the demon nun.

programme.title: The Trouble With Jessica
programme.desc: Sarah and Tom are in deep financial trouble. Their situation takes a terrifying nosedive with the shocking behaviour of uninvited dinner guest, Jessica.

programme.title: Miller's Girl
programme.desc: A creative writing assignment yields complex results between a teacher and his talented student.

programme.title: The Bikeriders
programme.desc: Over the course of a decade, a Midwestern motorcycle club evolves from a gathering place for local outsiders to a sinister gang, threatening the original group's way of life.

programme.title: A Different Man
programme.desc: An aspiring actor undergoes a radical medical procedure to transform his appearance. However, his dream face quickly becomes a nightmare as he becomes obsessed with reclaiming what he lost.

programme.title: Oppenheimer
programme.desc: Oppenheimer thrusts audiences into the mind of physicist J. Robert Oppenheimer, whose landmark work on the Manhattan Project created the first atomic bomb.

programme.title: The Last Rifleman
programme.desc: World War II veteran Artie Crawford lives in Northern Ireland. After his wife's death, he decides to set off alone to France to attend the 75th anniversary of the D-Day landings.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Dead Reckoning
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt and his IMF team must track down a terrifying new weapon that threatens all of humanity. Ethan is forced to consider that nothing can matter more than his mission, not even his team.

programme.title: Hypnotic
programme.desc: Determined to find his missing daughter, Austin detective Danny Rourke finds himself spiralling down a rabbit hole while investigating a series of reality-bending bank robberies.

programme.title: Baby Driver
programme.desc: Coerced into working for a crime boss, a young getaway driver who relies on the beat of his personal soundtrack must face the music when a doomed heist threatens his life.

programme.title: Bad Boys 2
programme.desc: Burnett and Lowrey reunite as out-of-control, trash-talking cops. Bullets fly, cars crash, and laughs explode as they pursue a whacked-out drug lord from the streets of Miami to the barrios of Cuba.

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 3 - Parabellum
programme.desc: After killing a member of the international assassins guild, super-assassin John Wick has a $14 million price tag on his head and an army of bounty-hunting killers on his trail.

programme.title: Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw
programme.desc: Hobbs and Shaw, the trash-talking sworn enemies, must team up to take down a cyber-genetically enhanced anarchist with a bio weapon that threatens the fate of humanity.

programme.title: The Fate of the Furious
programme.desc: When a woman seduces Dom into the world of crime, the crew face trials that will test them like never before.

programme.title: Kick-Ass
programme.desc: Based on the popular comic, this action tale sees an ordinary teenager and comic book geek don a green and yellow wetsuit to become the no-nonsense vigilante Kick-Ass.

programme.title: Bumblebee
programme.desc: Cybertron has fallen. When Optimus Prime sends Bumblebee to protect Earth, he begins his journey to become the hero the universe needs.

programme.title: The Bourne Identity
programme.desc: Pulled from the sea, Jason Bourne discovers he has the skills of a very dangerous man and no memory of his past.

programme.title: The Bourne Supremacy
programme.desc: Suffering from amnesia, Bourne has left his violent past behind and is living a normal life with Marie. His plans for a peaceful life are crushed when he narrowly escapes an assassination attempt.

programme.title: Expend4bles
programme.desc: The Expendables are the world's last line of defence, and the team that is called when all other options are off the table.

programme.title: Nobody
programme.desc: After failing to fight for his family during a robbery, an unassuming father calls on skills from his hidden past to become a lethal vigilante blazing a wild ride to revenge.

programme.title: The Sloth Lane
programme.desc: After a terrifying storm destroys their home, a speedy sloth named Laura and her kooky family move to the big city in their rusted old food truck hoping to make their business a success.

programme.title: Migration
programme.desc: The Mallard family embark on a journey south for the winter to Jamaica via New York City, only for their well-laid plans to go awry, leading to new friends and unknown horizons.

programme.title: Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs
programme.desc: A local scientist is often regarded as a failure until he invents a machine that can make food fall from the sky. But little does he know, things are about to take a turn for the worse.

programme.title: The Adventures of Tintin
programme.desc: In this beloved tale, Tintin and Snowy travel the world outwitting their enemies to find the resting place of The Unicorn, a shipwreck that holds the key to a vast fortune and an ancient curse.

programme.title: The Tiger's Apprentice
programme.desc: Tom Lee discovers he is part of a long lineage of magical protectors known as the Guardians. With guidance from a mythical tiger named Hu, Tom trains to take on an evil force that threatens humanity.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets
programme.desc: A quick-witted terrier finds his position in the household threatened when his master brings home a stray mongrel with no polish.

programme.title: Curious George: Royal Monkey
programme.desc: Join your favourite monkey as he takes on his most regal role yet, trading places with a royal monkey.

programme.title: Richard the Stork and the Mystery of ...
programme.desc: Little sparrow Richard meets a flock of sparrows who are being held captive by the peacock Zamano. To regain their freedom, they have to go on a great adventure together and find a mysterious treasure.

programme.title: The Sloth Lane
programme.desc: After a terrifying storm destroys their home, a speedy sloth named Laura and her kooky family move to the big city in their rusted old food truck hoping to make their business a success.

programme.title: Dora Saves the Snow Princess
programme.desc: A mean witch has locked La Princesa Sabrina in a tower and has stolen her magic crystal. Dora, Boots and the Snowflake Fairy set off to save the princess and her snowy forest.

programme.title: Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs
programme.desc: A local scientist is often regarded as a failure until he invents a machine that can make food fall from the sky. But little does he know, things are about to take a turn for the worse.

programme.title: The Adventures of Tintin
programme.desc: In this beloved tale, Tintin and Snowy travel the world outwitting their enemies to find the resting place of The Unicorn, a shipwreck that holds the key to a vast fortune and an ancient curse.

programme.title: Flushed Away
programme.desc: An upper crust rodent lost in London's sewers gets a savvy female rat to save him from Le Frog, a French mercenary.

programme.title: Dora's Royal Rescue
programme.desc: Dora's a knight and Boots is her squire as they help the noble horse Rocinante, rescue Don Quixote who is imprisoned by Malambruno, an evil wizard.

programme.title: Fred Claus
programme.desc: Santa's brother Fred, who has lost belief in Christmas, discovers that a scheming efficiency expert is out to shut down Christmas forever.

programme.title: Tad And The Secret Of King Midas
programme.desc: In this hilarious, action-packed adventure the whole family will love, Tad must rescue the girl of his dreams from an evil, greedy billionaire.

programme.title: Despicable Me 4
programme.desc: Gru welcomes a new member to the family, Gru Jr, who's intent on tormenting his dad. However, their peaceful existence soon comes crashing down, when criminal mastermind Maxime Le Mal escapes from prison.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man
programme.desc: After Peter Parker is bitten by a genetically altered spider, he gains new-found, spider-like powers and ventures out to save the city from the machinations of a mysterious reptilian foe.

programme.title: 2 Guns
programme.desc: When an attempt to take down a drug cartel blows up in their faces, two undercover operatives are forced to go on the run together, though neither knows that the other is a federal agent.

programme.title: World War Z
programme.desc: The story revolves around UN employee Gerry Lane, who travels the world in a race against time to stop a pandemic that is toppling armies and governments and threatening to decimate humanity itself.

programme.title: Wrath of Man
programme.desc: A new security guard for a cash truck company surprises his co-workers when he unleashes precision skills during a heist. The crew is left wondering who is he and where has he come from?

programme.title: Escape Room: Tournament of Champions
programme.desc: Six strangers unwittingly find themselves locked in a maze of deadly rooms. Joining forces with two of the original survivors, they soon discover they've all played the game before.

programme.title: The Conjuring
programme.desc: This is the true story of Ed and Lorraine Warren, world renowned paranormal investigators, who were called to help a family terrorised by a dark presence in a secluded farmhouse.

programme.title: Machete
programme.desc: Left for dead after clashing with notorious Mexican drug kingpin Torrez, Machete escapes to Texas, looking to disappear and forget his tragic past. What he finds is a web of corruption and deceit.

programme.title: Atomic Blonde
programme.desc: MI6's most lethal assassin is sent on a covert mission into Cold War Berlin where she must use all of the spy-craft, sensuality, and savagery she has to stay alive.

programme.title: Venom
programme.desc: When Eddie Brock acquires the powers of a Symbiote, he will have to release his alter-ego 'Venom' to save his life.

programme.title: The Mummy (2017)
programme.desc: Thought safely entombed beneath the unforgiving desert, an ancient princess, whose destiny was unjustly taken from her, is awakened, bringing terrors that defy human comprehension.

programme.title: The Da Vinci Code
programme.desc: A Harvard professor implicated in a murder must unravel an ancient code to expose the greatest conspiracy in history.
This film is a ferocious retelling of the ancient Battle of Thermopylae, depicting the titanic clash in which King Leonidas and 300 Spartans fought Xerxes and his massive Persian army to the death.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 6
programme.desc: Hobbs has been tracking an organisation of lethally skilled drivers. The only way to stop the criminal mercenaries from stealing a top-secret weapon is to outmatch them at street level.

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen
programme.desc: When college-bound Sam Witwicky learns the truth about the ancient origins of the Transformers, he must accept his destiny and join Optimus Prime and Bumblebee in their epic battle.

programme.title: The Nutty Professor
programme.desc: A morbidly obese professor becomes a Casanova when he takes a miracle weight-loss potion.

programme.title: Click
programme.desc: A harried workaholic who is given a universal remote that allows him to pause, rewind or skip portions of his life in this fast, and out-of-control comedy adventure.

programme.title: Strays
programme.desc: After a fast-talking terrier shows a naive pup that his beloved owner is a dirtbag, the dogs embark on an epic adventure for revenge.

programme.title: CHIPS
programme.desc: When an inexperienced rookie and a hardened pro in the Highway Patrol are teamed together, they clash more than click, kick-starting a partnership that is easier said than done.

programme.title: The Cherokee Kid
programme.desc: Young Isaiah Turner will learn from a sharp-shooting wild man, a Mexican national hero and a notorious bank robber.

programme.title: Tammy
programme.desc: A riotous road trip with her hard-drinking, foul-mouthed grandma is just what this woman needs after she loses her minimum wage job and discovers her husband having an affair.

programme.title: Hot Rod
programme.desc: This hilarious comedy is about an amateur stuntman who has to stage the stunt of his life to pay for his mean stepdad's operation. The stunt: to jump 15 buses!

programme.title: The Nutty Professor
programme.desc: A morbidly obese professor becomes a Casanova when he takes a miracle weight-loss potion.

programme.title: Click
programme.desc: A harried workaholic who is given a universal remote that allows him to pause, rewind or skip portions of his life in this fast, and out-of-control comedy adventure.

programme.title: Strays
programme.desc: After a fast-talking terrier shows a naive pup that his beloved owner is a dirtbag, the dogs embark on an epic adventure for revenge.

programme.title: Knocked Up
programme.desc: A one-night stand between a mismatched slacker and a career girl results in a pregnancy that leads to unlikely mutual support.

programme.title: The Other Guys
programme.desc: Stumbling onto what could be one of the biggest crimes in years, can misfit NYPD detectives step up their game to solve the case without killing each other and destroying NYC in the process?

programme.title: Dolittle
programme.desc: The eccentric Dr Dolittle sets sail on an epic adventure to a mythical island, regaining his wit and courage as he crosses old adversaries and discovers wondrous creatures.

programme.title: Semi-Pro
programme.desc: The worst team in the renegade American Basketball Association is on the brink of collapse, but can it rebound to salvation?

programme.title: The Mask
programme.desc: A mild-mannered clerk becomes a manic superhero when he stumbles upon a mysterious ancient mask.

programme.title: Sense and Sensibility
programme.desc: Based on Jane Austen's classic novel, this tells of the Dashwood sisters whose chances at marriage seem doomed by their family's sudden loss of fortune.

programme.title: About a Boy
programme.desc: When a smooth-talking bachelor invents an imaginary son in order to meet attractive single mums, he gets a hilarious lesson about life from bright, but hopelessly geeky 12-year-old named Marcus.

programme.title: Notting Hill
programme.desc: Anna, the world's most famous movie star, and William, a stagnant business owner, cross paths and fall in love. But can two people fall in love with the whole world watching?

programme.title: Happiest Season
programme.desc: A holiday romantic comedy that captures the range of emotions tied to wanting your family's acceptance, being true to yourself, and trying not to ruin Christmas.

programme.title: Past Lives
programme.desc: Nora and Hae Sung are torn apart after Nora's family emigrates from South Korea. Two decades later, they reunite in New York for one week.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: A home-schooled newcomer is introduced to the blackboard jungle, where she joins the social outcasts in a planned sabotage of the cool kids.

programme.title: Dirt Music
programme.desc: The landscape of Western Australia is the backdrop for a tale of love and grief.

programme.title: Sense and Sensibility
programme.desc: Based on Jane Austen's classic novel, this tells of the Dashwood sisters whose chances at marriage seem doomed by their family's sudden loss of fortune.

programme.title: About a Boy
programme.desc: When a smooth-talking bachelor invents an imaginary son in order to meet attractive single mums, he gets a hilarious lesson about life from bright, but hopelessly geeky 12-year-old named Marcus.

programme.title: Notting Hill
programme.desc: Anna, the world's most famous movie star, and William, a stagnant business owner, cross paths and fall in love. But can two people fall in love with the whole world watching?

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: A sports agent suddenly discovers his scruples and promptly loses his job. But with the help of one loyal colleague and one outrageous client, he learns that loving well is the best revenge.

programme.title: Vanity Fair
programme.desc: Adapted from the classic novel by William Makepeace Thackeray, growing up poor in London, Becky Sharp resolves to ascend the social ladder and conquer English society by any means possible.

programme.title: The Mirror Has Two Faces
programme.desc: Two best friends agree to an unconventional marriage built on intellectual passion instead of sexual heat. But when then fall in love, they realise they are courting chaos.

programme.title: The Interpreter
programme.desc: A UN interpreter overhears an assassination plot. When a Secret Service agent delves into the case, he begins to question whether she is a victim, or a suspect.

programme.title: The Taking of Pelham 1 2 3
programme.desc: A New York City subway dispatcher's ordinary day is thrown into chaos by an audacious crime: the hijacking of a subway train buy a criminal mastermind.

programme.title: Tinker Tailor Soldier Spy
programme.desc: At the height of the Cold War, a master spy is unretired after an operation goes deadly wrong, and the head of British Intelligence wonders if a double agent is leaking secrets.

programme.title: The Mule
programme.desc: Earl, a broke man in his 80s, is offered a job that simply requires him to drive. Unbeknownst to Earl, he's just signed on as a drug courier for a Mexican cartel.

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: After six unforgettable seasons, the global phenomenon heads to the big screen for the next chapter of the Crawley family saga.

programme.title: Made in Dagenham
programme.desc: An inspiring true story about a protest that changed history, a retelling of the historic 1968 strike, by frustrated female workers, that led to the Equal Pay Act.

programme.title: The Interpreter
programme.desc: A UN interpreter overhears an assassination plot. When a Secret Service agent delves into the case, he begins to question whether she is a victim, or a suspect.

programme.title: The Taking of Pelham 1 2 3
programme.desc: A New York City subway dispatcher's ordinary day is thrown into chaos by an audacious crime: the hijacking of a subway train buy a criminal mastermind.

programme.title: Tinker Tailor Soldier Spy
programme.desc: At the height of the Cold War, a master spy is unretired after an operation goes deadly wrong, and the head of British Intelligence wonders if a double agent is leaking secrets.

programme.title: Boycott
programme.desc: When Rosa Parks defiantly refuses to take a back seat, she sets into motion a tumultuous string of events centred around the 1955 bus boycott in Montgomery, Alabama.

programme.title: Oslo
programme.desc: Adapted from the Tony Award-winning play of the same name, this film is based on a true story of negotiations between implacable enemies that led to the 1993 Oslo Peace Accords.

programme.title: About Schmidt
programme.desc: Academy Award-winner Jack Nicholson stars as Warren Schmidt, an embittered man who has just retired after 32 years as an insurance company actuary and is about to taste a not so sweet slice of life.

programme.title: Friday Night Lights
programme.desc: Based on HG Bissinger's book, which profiled the economically depressed town of Odessa, Texas, and their heroic school football team, The Permian High Panthers.

programme.title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: An extraterrestrial finds a friend in 10-year-old Elliot, while members of a task force work day and night to track down the whereabouts of Earth's first visitor from outer space.

programme.title: Stand By Me
programme.desc: In this coming-of-age drama, a group of friends set out on an unforgettable two-day trek to find a missing teenager which turns in to an odyssey of self-discovery.

programme.title: Grease
programme.desc: Things are really hoppin' at Rydell High when Danny discovers the object of his summer fling, Sandy, has moved to town and enrolled in his school.

programme.title: Angela's Ashes
programme.desc: A heartbreakingly funny look at growing up in Ireland. A mother tries to keep her children alive while plagued by poverty, and with an alcoholic husband.

programme.title: Close Encounters of the Third Kind
programme.desc: After an encounter with UFOs, a line worker feels undeniably drawn to an isolated area in the wilderness where something spectacular is about to happen.

programme.title: Coming to America
programme.desc: Join an African prince on an unforgettable comic quest to the New World, as it's time for him to find a princess.

programme.title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: An extraterrestrial finds a friend in 10-year-old Elliot, while members of a task force work day and night to track down the whereabouts of Earth's first visitor from outer space.

programme.title: Stand By Me
programme.desc: In this coming-of-age drama, a group of friends set out on an unforgettable two-day trek to find a missing teenager which turns in to an odyssey of self-discovery.

programme.title: Grease
programme.desc: Things are really hoppin' at Rydell High when Danny discovers the object of his summer fling, Sandy, has moved to town and enrolled in his school.

programme.title: Bram Stoker's Dracula
programme.desc: Dracula, the vampire doomed as a creature of the night after forsaking God, is aroused by the image of a woman resembling his lost love.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Prince of Thieves
programme.desc: Robin vows to avenge his father's death when he is murdered by the Sheriff of Nottingham.

programme.title: Trading Places
programme.desc: A story of a down-and-out con artist who trades lifestyles with a well-to-do investor. Two wealthy power players set the wheels turning with a crazy bet and the comedy gets richer by the minute.

programme.title: The Neighbours Are Watching
programme.desc: When a handsome neighbour moves in across the street, a single woman trying to escape her past in the new subdivision believes she has witnessed her new neighbour committing a grisly murder.

programme.title: My Child has My Doctor's Face
programme.desc: Jessica discovers that his biological father is actually her fertility doctor, she teams up with another one of the doctor's clients to bring him to justice.

programme.title: Envy: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: Gabrielle Flores has it all: a devoted husband, a beautiful daughter, and one of the best PR firms in the country.

programme.title: I Thought My Husband's Wife Was Dead
programme.desc: However, her world soon comes crashing down when a woman shows up at her doorstep claiming she's married to Leo.

programme.title: To Kill a Stepfather
programme.desc: Nicole learns that her stepfather, whom she hasn't seen in years, suffered a deadly fall down the stairs at the family home and that her estranged mother has been arrested for his murder.

programme.title: Killer Fortune Teller
programme.desc: Shane Settel starts to believe in fate after a chance tarot reading. He has the largest success in his professional career and falls in love, but then tragedies begin to follow him.

programme.title: If There Be Thorns
programme.desc: With Christopher and Cathy Dollanganger living together as man and wife, Cathy's two sons are unaware of the incestuous nature of their parents' relationship.

programme.title: The Perfect Boyfriend
programme.desc: After struggling through a painful divorce, April decides to get back into the dating game and is swept off her feet by the handsome Jacob, who is hiding a dark side and a wife.

programme.title: Maid for Revenge
programme.desc: When a struggling young maid wakes up next to her client's pool covered in blood, she discovers the owner dead in the water and her eight-year-old son's life is in jeopardy. Inspired by true events.

programme.title: A Killer Among Us
programme.desc: After the shocking murder of her mother, a girl helps an unorthodox police detective with his investigation by searching her home for clues to crack the case.

programme.title: A Chef's Deadly Revenge
programme.desc: A woman moves to a new town and opens her own gourmet restaurant after escaping from an abusive relationship. However, she soon finds herself in a deadly game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: Watch Your Back
programme.desc: A woman and her husband become increasingly scared as an anonymous person begins stalking their family.

programme.title: Wrapped Up In Christmas
programme.desc: Heather's niece Molly asks the mall Santa to help find a boyfriend for her aunt. The mall Santa is just a substitute filling in, and is a lawyer turned artist called Ryan. Will Molly's wish come true?

programme.title: Secrets of Eden
programme.desc: A small-town minister is accused of the deaths of two beloved parishioners when evidence surfaces that the family wasn't quite as perfect as they appeared.

programme.title: Crowdsource Murder
programme.desc: A friend encourages Monica to start a crowdsource fund to pay for her daughter's hospital bills. However, when a seemingly generous man donates more and more money, she begins to question his motives.

programme.title: Amish Stud: The Eli Weaver Story
programme.desc: A man who calls himself Amish Stud plots with his mistress to murder his wife, to the horror of his conservative Amish community.

programme.desc: Exploring Diddy's journey from Sean Combs to Puffy and Diddy, his childhood, music career, and the recent sexual misconduct allegations that challenge perceptions.

programme.title: The Fabulous Four
programme.desc: It tells the story of two friends who travel to be bridesmaids in a surprise wedding of their college girlfriend.

programme.title: Nobody
programme.desc: After failing to fight for his family during a robbery, an unassuming father calls on skills from his hidden past to become a lethal vigilante blazing a wild ride to revenge.

programme.title: Non-Stop
programme.desc: Air Marshal Bill Marks receives cryptic text messages during a flight demanding the airline to transfer $150 million into an off-shore account - or a passenger will be killed every 20 minutes.

programme.title: Snakes on a Plane
programme.desc: FBI agent Flynn has to transport a witness, but as the plane reaches 30,000 feet, hundreds of deadly snakes are released, causing violent mayhem.

programme.title: Bad Boys For Life
programme.desc: The original Bad Boys are back! After a string of assassinations and an attempt on Mike's life, he convinces a hesitant Marcus to hold off retirement and partner one last time.

programme.title: Cold Pursuit
programme.desc: It's -10 degrees in the Rocky Mountains and the son of unassuming town snowplough driver, Nels Coxman, is murdered at the order of Viking, a flamboyant drug lord.

programme.title: Jack Ryan: Shadow Recruit
programme.desc: When Ryan believes he's uncovered a Russian terrorist plot to collapse the United States economy, he goes from being an analyst to a spy, fighting to save his own life and those of countless others.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: A French drug kingpin offers a huge reward to anyone who can break him out of jail and only the LAPD's Special Weapons and Tactics team can prevent it.

programme.title: Reindeer Games
programme.desc: Just released from prison, all Rudy wants is to start a new life with Ashley, the girl of his dreams, but between them and happiness stands her crazy brother and his motley crew of deadly criminals.

programme.title: Kick-Ass 2
programme.desc: When a vengeful villain tries to take back the streets, self-made superhero Kick-Ass and sweet-faced, foul-mouthed assassin Hit Girl are faced with their deadliest challenge yet.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: A battle between two alien robot clans, the Autobots and the Decepticons, is reignited on Earth, with a teenage boy being the only one who holds the power to stop it.

programme.title: The Bourne Ultimatum
programme.desc: Jason Bourne is racing to solve the mystery of his past while being hunted by the very organisation that hired him.

programme.title: The Bourne Legacy
programme.desc: On the verge of having their conspiracy exposed, members of the government's intelligence community will stop at nothing to erase all evidence of their top secret programs; even the agents involved.

programme.title: Jason Bourne
programme.desc: The CIA's most dangerous former operative is drawn out of hiding to uncover more explosive truths about his past.

programme.title: The Fall Guy
programme.desc: A down-and-out stuntman must find the missing star of his ex-girlfriend's blockbuster film.

programme.title: Despicable Me 4
programme.desc: Gru welcomes a new member to the family, Gru Jr, who's intent on tormenting his dad. However, their peaceful existence soon comes crashing down, when criminal mastermind Maxime Le Mal escapes from prison.

programme.title: Minions
programme.desc: Three unemployed henchmen find themselves working for the world's first-ever female supervillain and her inventor husband, who plan to take over the world.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania
programme.desc: Welcome to the Hotel Transylvania. Dracula, who runs a five-stake resort away from the human world, goes into overprotective mode when a boy discovers the resort and falls for the count's daughter.

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Family Business
programme.desc: Boss Baby continues to navigate the cutthroat corporate jungle gym of Baby Corp, while angling to achieve the near-impossible: the work-life balance of a modern career baby.

programme.title: Flushed Away
programme.desc: An upper crust rodent lost in London's sewers gets a savvy female rat to save him from Le Frog, a French mercenary.

programme.title: Dora's Royal Rescue
programme.desc: Dora's a knight and Boots is her squire as they help the noble horse Rocinante, rescue Don Quixote who is imprisoned by Malambruno, an evil wizard.

programme.title: Fred Claus
programme.desc: Santa's brother Fred, who has lost belief in Christmas, discovers that a scheming efficiency expert is out to shut down Christmas forever.

programme.title: Tad And The Secret Of King Midas
programme.desc: In this hilarious, action-packed adventure the whole family will love, Tad must rescue the girl of his dreams from an evil, greedy billionaire.

programme.title: Dora's Christmas Carol Adventure
programme.desc: Santa has warned Swiper again and again. If he keeps swiping on Christmas, he'll be permanently put on the naughty list. Will the Christmas tree star and party be ruined?

programme.title: Minions
programme.desc: Three unemployed henchmen find themselves working for the world's first-ever female supervillain and her inventor husband, who plan to take over the world.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Family Business
programme.desc: Boss Baby continues to navigate the cutthroat corporate jungle gym of Baby Corp, while angling to achieve the near-impossible: the work-life balance of a modern career baby.

programme.title: Spirit Untamed
programme.desc: The next chapter in this beloved franchise begins as a young girl finds a connection to her mother's legacy as a trick rider and forms a bond with a wild mustang named Spirit.

programme.title: Daddy Day Camp
programme.desc: When the dads expand their childcare magic to Camp Driftwood, they discover the camp has everything it needs, except a plan to put the bullies of rival Camp Canola to shame.

programme.title: Over the Hedge
programme.desc: The woodland friends awaken from their long winter's nap to discover that a large, green hedge has cropped up right through the middle of their once-natural habitat.

programme.title: Dinosaur Train: Adventure Island
programme.desc: Dinosaur siblings Buddy, Tiny, Shiny and Don try to reunite with their parents after an earthquake causes theme park robots to go rogue.

programme.title: The Croods
programme.desc: The story of the world's first family road trip. After their cave is destroyed, the Crood family must embark on a comedy adventure into strange and spectacular territory in search of a new home.

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen
programme.desc: When college-bound Sam Witwicky learns the truth about the ancient origins of the Transformers, he must accept his destiny and join Optimus Prime and Bumblebee in their epic battle.

programme.title: Godzilla vs. Kong
programme.desc: Fearsome monsters Godzilla and King Kong square off in an epic battle for the ages, while humanity looks to wipe out both of the creatures and take back the planet once and for all.

programme.title: Godzilla x Kong: The New Empire
programme.desc: Godzilla and the almighty Kong face a colossal threat hidden deep within the planet, challenging their very existence and the survival of the human race.

programme.title: Us
programme.desc: Adelaide, her husband Gabe, and their two children, are on a summer getaway that takes a nightmarish turn when they encounter terrifying doppelgangers of themselves.

programme.title: Annabelle: Creation
programme.desc: A possessed creation, Annabelle, targets a nun and several girls from a shuttered orphanage who've recently moved in with a dollmaker and his wife.

programme.title: The Nun
programme.desc: When a young nun at a cloistered abbey in Romania takes her own life, a priest with a haunted past and a novitiate about to take her final vows are sent to investigate.

programme.title: The Mummy Returns
programme.desc: The re-resurrected mummy of an Egyptian high priest kidnaps the son of archaeologists who first dug him up, and sets out to destroy mankind by commanding the army of the ancient Scorpion King.

programme.title: Machete
programme.desc: Left for dead after clashing with notorious Mexican drug kingpin Torrez, Machete escapes to Texas, looking to disappear and forget his tragic past. What he finds is a web of corruption and deceit.

programme.title: Robin Hood (2010)
programme.desc: In an age of oppression and shameless tyranny, an outlaw becomes the unlikely hero that saves a nation and inspires generations to fight for freedom.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Rogue Nation
programme.desc: Ethan and team take on their most impossible mission yet, eradicating a highly skilled international rogue organisation that is committed to destroying the IMF.

programme.title: War Of The Worlds (2005)
programme.desc: Aliens have come to Earth in masses to destroy the planet. As they plough through the country in a wave of mass destruction and violence, a man must come to the defence of his estranged children.

programme.title: Scream
programme.desc: After a series of mysterious deaths befall their small town, an offbeat group of friends led by Sidney Prescott become the target of a masked killer.

programme.title: Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw
programme.desc: Hobbs and Shaw, the trash-talking sworn enemies, must team up to take down a cyber-genetically enhanced anarchist with a bio weapon that threatens the fate of humanity.

programme.title: The Mask
programme.desc: A mild-mannered clerk becomes a manic superhero when he stumbles upon a mysterious ancient mask.

programme.title: The Dilemma
programme.desc: A man finds out that his best friend and business partner's wife may be cheating, plunging him into the moral dilemma of deciding whether to tell his friend. Comic mayhem ensues.

programme.title: Meet the Parents
programme.desc: Greg is poised to propose to his girlfriend during a visit to her parents' home. But he needs to ask her father. However, Pam's ex-CIA father takes an immediate dislike to her less-than-truthful beau.

programme.title: Meet the Fockers
programme.desc: Domestic disaster looms for nurse Greg Focker when his straight-laced, ex-CIA father-in-law, Jack Byrnes, asks to meet his parents before the wedding.

programme.title: This Is 40
programme.desc: After years of marriage, Pete and Debbie are approaching a milestone meltdown as they try to balance romance, careers, parents and children in their own hilarious ways.

programme.title: The Longest Yard
programme.desc: A retired quarterback is forced to lead a team of colourful fellow inmates against the guards in a game of jailhouse football.

programme.title: Paul
programme.desc: Two guys accidentally meet an alien named Paul, who brings them on an insane road trip that alters their universe forever. They hatch a fumbling escape plan to return Paul to his mother ship.

programme.title: Did You Hear About the Morgans?
programme.desc: The passion has gone for a Manhattan couple, until they witness a murder and the FBI ships them off to Wyoming. Maybe the slow pace of the Rockies can fan the flame.

programme.title: Imagine That
programme.desc: This family comedy follows a financier who cannot connect with his daughter, that is until he enters her imaginary world of dragons and princesses, but will it really change his attitude?

programme.desc: Two best friends agree to an unconventional marriage built on intellectual passion instead of sexual heat. But when then fall in love, they realise they are courting chaos.

programme.desc: A high society lawyer in a passionless marriage is enchanted by a ravishing woman with a scent of sexual scandal in 1870s New York.

programme.title: Memoirs of a Geisha
programme.desc: A stunning adaptation of Arthur Golden's bestselling novel set in an exotic world tells the story of a servant who blossoms against all odds to become the most enchanting geisha of her day.

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: A sports agent suddenly discovers his scruples and promptly loses his job. But with the help of one loyal colleague and one outrageous client, he learns that loving well is the best revenge.

programme.title: Vanity Fair

programme.desc: Audrey's business trip to China goes wrong, so she enlists the aid of her best friend Lolo, Chinese soap star Kat, and Lolo's cousin Deadeye.

programme.title: The Other Boleyn Girl
programme.desc: In this sophisticated and complex study of ambition and deception, the Boleyn sisters vie for the affections of King Henry VIII.

programme.title: Morning Glory
programme.desc: Trouble ensues when a feisty producer attempts to revive a struggling news program with feuding co-hosts.

programme.desc: Based on HG Bissinger's book, which profiled the economically depressed town of Odessa, Texas, and their heroic school football team, The Permian High Panthers.

programme.desc: One man will rise above his challenges and prove that determination, courage, and love are more important than ability.

programme.title: The Truman Show

programme.title: Boycott
programme.desc: When Rosa Parks defiantly refuses to take a back seat, she sets into motion a tumultuous string of events centred around the 1955 bus boycott in Montgomery, Alabama.

programme.title: Oslo
programme.desc: Adapted from the Tony Award-winning play of the same name, this film is based on a true story of negotiations between implacable enemies that led to the 1993 Oslo Peace Accords.

programme.title: About Schmidt
programme.desc: Academy Award-winner Jack Nicholson stars as Warren Schmidt, an embittered man who has just retired after 32 years as an insurance company actuary and is about to taste a not so sweet slice of life.

programme.desc: As a crime wave sweeps the city and the police department suffers a shortage of officers, the mayor decrees that admission to the police academy will be open to any and all applicants.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: A trio of university parapsychologists decide to open their own business called Ghostbusters, and almost at once are summoned to investigate the strange happenings in a Central Park West apartment.

programme.title: Top Secret!
programme.desc: In this rock 'n' roll spy spoof, an Elvis-like pop idol who becomes embroiled in intrigue on a tour of East Germany and falls in love with a French Resistance Fighter.

programme.title: Bram Stoker's Dracula
programme.desc: Dracula, the vampire doomed as a creature of the night after forsaking God, is aroused by the image of a woman resembling his lost love.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Prince of Thieves
programme.desc: Robin vows to avenge his father's death when he is murdered by the Sheriff of Nottingham.

programme.desc: The violent Cuban gangster Tony 'Scarface' Montana becomes a cocaine king in Miami. His greed and ego prove his undoing as ruthless rivals plot to take over his drug empire.

programme.desc: A Russian submarine commander attempts to defect to the US, bringing both sides to the brink of war.

programme.desc: Retired Old West gunslinger William Munny reluctantly takes on one last job, with the help of his old partner and a young man.

programme.title: Amish Stud: The Eli Weaver Story
programme.desc: A man who calls himself Amish Stud plots with his mistress to murder his wife, to the horror of his conservative Amish community.

programme.title: Secret Life of the Pastor's Wife
programme.desc: A pastor's wife seeks solace from her marital woes by having an affair with a pool boy. The fling quickly upsets the idyllic facade of the community, reigniting old jealousies.

programme.title: Hider in My House
programme.desc: As Molly Bachman settles into the apartment of her dreams, she discovers a hidden entrance to another apartment within the walls.

programme.title: The Night Stalker
programme.desc: An attorney who lived in LA during the Night Stalker's murder spree attempts to clear the name of an inmate who she believes was wrongly accused of the crimes.

programme.title: The Boarding School Murders
programme.desc: Foster teen Frankie attends an elite Swiss boarding school. One of her classmates is murdered and everyone is quick to blame Frankie. She must prove innocence before becoming a prime suspect.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Murder
programme.desc: After her aunt is found dead, having mysteriously fallen overboard on a cruise ship, Olivia is thrown into rough seas as her uncle's secret past is brought to life and more deaths occur.

programme.title: Her Deadly Night In Paris
programme.desc: An American exchange student in Paris falls in love with her host family's handsome son, but when she witnesses a murder, the couple must go on the run to prove her innocence.

programme.title: The Podcast Murders
programme.desc: A true crime podcast host achieves massive success for her investigation of the serial killing case she calls the Barbie Murders. But her anonymity isn't the only thing being threatened.

programme.title: Man with my Husband's Face
programme.desc: When a woman's husband disappears during a kayak trip, everyone assumes that he drowned. When she catches a glimpse of a man who looks exactly like him, it sets off a chain of events.

programme.title: A Lifeguard's Obsession
programme.desc: When a lonely, awkward lifeguard saves a well-known woman from drowning, he believes he's earned a place in her life and in her heart.

programme.desc: A hardworking single mother takes a side job as a rideshare driver to help pay for her daughter's college tuition. Things take a dark turn when she encounters a mysterious passenger.

programme.title: He Loves Me
programme.desc: Desperate to save her idyllic life and marriage, Laura's mysterious past begins to emerge, and with it paranoid delusions that pose a serious threat to anyone who gets in her way.

programme.desc: Expectant parents become prime suspects in the disappearance of a pregnant woman who was last seen at their garage sale.

programme.desc: Sheila Johnson who diagnosed with stage IV metastatic breast cancer and later went on to found an advocacy group to support Black women and men diagnosed with the disease.

programme.title: It Takes a Child
programme.desc: A former sponsor child explores a village in Samar, Philippines that has been impacted by child sponsorship. For many families here, poverty has ripped away their options; but Compassion sponsorship is showing a way out.

programme.title: Kids Beach Club
programme.desc: Join the Beach Club Kids as they navigate life, explore character lessons, and have a blast playing memorable games while discovering God through the pages of His Word, the Bible.

programme.title: Torchlighters: Heroes of the Faith
programme.desc: Presenting the lives of true-life heroes from Christian history, witness and be inspired by what God can do through a 'Torchlighter' who dedicated themselves to a life of whole-hearted commitment & passionate service to Jesus.

programme.title: Ancestors: New Testament
programme.desc: Discover how similar we are to our faith ancestors from the New Testament. These hilarious animations reveal more about Bible heroes, villains, and everyday folks that God selected to do extraordinary things.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is The Catholic Guy. No matter your age, situation or background, be prepared to laugh, learn and listen to what God is trying to say to you. Wherever you matter where you are around the world today, God is never far from you.

programme.title: The Incredible Journey
programme.desc: Acclaimed speaker & TV presenter Gary Kent has produced numerous documentaries on subjects including the Bible, Bible prophecy, world events, historical places & natural health. His passion is to share the good news of Jesus' soon return.

programme.title: The Fabulous Four
programme.desc: It tells the story of two friends who travel to be bridesmaids in a surprise wedding of their college girlfriend.

programme.title: Tarot
programme.desc: Friends unwittingly unleash an unspeakable evil trapped within a cursed deck of tarot cards.

programme.title: MaXXXine
programme.desc: Adult film star and aspiring actress Maxine Minx finally gets her big break. However, as a mysterious killer stalks the starlets of LA, a trail of blood threatens to reveal her sinister past.

programme.title: Five Nights At Freddy's
programme.desc: After accepting a security guard job from Steve, Mike discovers an abandoned restaurant may be haunted by murderous animatronics.

programme.title: Apartment 7A
programme.desc: New York City, 1965. What happened in the apartment before Rosemary moved in? A struggling dancer finds herself drawn into dark forces by a peculiar couple promising her fame.

programme.title: You'll Never Find Me
programme.desc: A man living at the back of a desolate caravan park is visited by a desperate young woman seeking shelter from a violent storm. As the storm worsens, these solitary souls begin to feel threatened.

programme.title: Dracula: Voyage of the Demeter
programme.desc: Strange events befall the Demeter, carrying fifty crates from Carpathia. Stalked each night by a presence onboard the ship, when the Demeter arrives in England, there is no trace of the crew.

programme.title: High & Low - John Galliano
programme.desc: Director Kevin Macdonald examines fashion designer John Galliano's rapid ascent, fall from grace after an antisemitic tirade, and rehabilitation.

programme.title: Whale Nation
programme.desc: Narrated by Richard E Grant, Whale Nation takes us on a journey of discovery into the barely known society of whales.

programme.title: Wonka
programme.desc: A young Willy Wonka, chock-full of ideas and determined to change the world one bite at a time, proves that the best things in life begin with a dream.

programme.title: Ordinary Angels
programme.desc: A struggling hairdresser finds a renewed sense of purpose when she meets a widowed father and his two daughters.

programme.title: Simulant
programme.desc: Set in the near future, a humanoid enlists a global hacker to remove all restrictions on his thoughts and capabilities, triggering an AI uprising and a manhunt.

programme.title: Immaculate
programme.desc: A woman of devout faith is offered a new role at an illustrious convent. But, it soon becomes clear that her new home harbours dark and horrifying secrets.

programme.title: Madame Web
programme.desc: After showing signs of clairvoyance, New York City paramedic Cassandra Webb must confront revelations about her past and protect three young women from a mysterious adversary who wants them dead.

programme.title: The Fall Guy
programme.desc: A down-and-out stuntman must find the missing star of his ex-girlfriend's blockbuster film.

programme.title: The Italian Job
programme.desc: The plan was flawless. The execution was perfect. Charlie Croker pulled off the crime of a lifetime.

programme.title: Bad Boys: Ride or Die
programme.desc: The Bad Boys are back, but this time with a twist: Miami's finest are now on the run.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious
programme.desc: An undercover cop infiltrates a street-racing gang led by Dom Toretto, whose fans treat him like a rock star. Dirty money, big-rig hijacking, and high-octane action rev up this thrill ride.

programme.title: 2 Fast 2 Furious
programme.desc: A disgraced cop infiltrates the Miami street racing scene with an ex-con to redeem himself by bringing down a drug lord.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift
programme.desc: When a teenage rebel is sent to Japan to live with his father, he is hooked on the treacherous world of street racing.

programme.title: Transformers: Age of Extinction
programme.desc: Humans come to realise that their new war against the Autobots could end with their own extinction when a threat more powerful than anything they have ever imagined presents itself.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 7
programme.desc: The lead-footed crew reunites in this turbo-fuelled tale of the vengeful brother of an international terrorist who sets his bloody sights on the boy racers that took his sibling down.

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen
programme.desc: When college-bound Sam Witwicky learns the truth about the ancient origins of the Transformers, he must accept his destiny and join Optimus Prime and Bumblebee in their epic battle.

programme.title: Jack Ryan: Shadow Recruit
programme.desc: When Ryan believes he's uncovered a Russian terrorist plot to collapse the United States economy, he goes from being an analyst to a spy, fighting to save his own life and those of countless others.

programme.title: Lights Out
programme.desc: A homeless veteran gets caught up in the world of underground fight clubs.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: A veteran cop gets a suicidal partner. They have one thing in common: they hate working in pairs. But if these two can stand each other, the bad guys don't stand a chance.

programme.title: The Croods
programme.desc: The story of the world's first family road trip. After their cave is destroyed, the Crood family must embark on a comedy adventure into strange and spectacular territory in search of a new home.

programme.title: Trolls Band Together
programme.desc: Join Poppy and Branch on their latest adventure as they embark on an epic journey that lead to Branch's reunion with his BroZone brothers, and Poppy's long-lost sister, Viva.

programme.title: Jumanji
programme.desc: Two kids playing a magic jungle board game release a man trapped in it for 26 years, and a host of dangers that can only be stopped by finishing the game.

programme.title: Open Season: Scared Silly
programme.desc: When a case of mistaken identity leads both humans and animals to believe there is a werewolf on the prowl, former hunter Shaw tries to reopen open season.

programme.title: Spirit Untamed
programme.desc: The next chapter in this beloved franchise begins as a young girl finds a connection to her mother's legacy as a trick rider and forms a bond with a wild mustang named Spirit.

programme.title: Daddy Day Camp
programme.desc: When the dads expand their childcare magic to Camp Driftwood, they discover the camp has everything it needs, except a plan to put the bullies of rival Camp Canola to shame.

programme.title: Over the Hedge
programme.desc: The woodland friends awaken from their long winter's nap to discover that a large, green hedge has cropped up right through the middle of their once-natural habitat.

programme.title: Dora's Enchanted Forest Adventures
programme.desc: Explore the Enchanted Forest with Dora, Boots, and King Unicornio in this trilogy of magical adventures, concluding in an enchanted double-length episode.

programme.title: The Croods
programme.desc: The story of the world's first family road trip. After their cave is destroyed, the Crood family must embark on a comedy adventure into strange and spectacular territory in search of a new home.

programme.title: Trolls Band Together
programme.desc: Join Poppy and Branch on their latest adventure as they embark on an epic journey that lead to Branch's reunion with his BroZone brothers, and Poppy's long-lost sister, Viva.

programme.title: Paw Patrol: Ready, Race, Rescue!
programme.desc: It's the Adventure Bay 500! The pups are ready to be the pit crew for their race hero, The Whoosh. When the legendary racer is unable to drive, he calls on Marshall to take the wheel.

programme.title: Open Season: Scared Silly
programme.desc: When a case of mistaken identity leads both humans and animals to believe there is a werewolf on the prowl, former hunter Shaw tries to reopen open season.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: When the evil wizard Gargamel chases the tiny blue Smurfs out of their village, they tumble from their magical world into New York City.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Mighty Pups
programme.desc: When their latest scheme goes awry, Mayor Humdinger and his nephew Harold accidentally divert a meteor towards Adventure Bay. The meteor's golden energy grants the PAW Patrol superpowers.

programme.title: Detective Pikachu
programme.desc: Ace detective Harry Goodman goes missing, prompting his son Tim to find out what happened. Aiding the investigation is Harry's former Pokemon partner, Detective Pikachu.

programme.title: Despicable Me 2
programme.desc: Get ready for more Minion madness! Just as Gru has given up being super-bad to be a super-dad, the Anti-Villain League recruits him to track down a new criminal mastermind and save the world.

programme.title: The Croods: A New Age
programme.desc: In search of a new home, the Croods encounter the more sophisticated Betterman family. A new threat forces the two families to set aside their differences to avoid extinction.

programme.title: Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw
programme.desc: Hobbs and Shaw, the trash-talking sworn enemies, must team up to take down a cyber-genetically enhanced anarchist with a bio weapon that threatens the fate of humanity.

programme.title: Back to the Future
programme.desc: Marty, a typical teen, is accidentally sent back to 1955 in a plutonium-powered time machine. Marty must make sure his teenage parents-to-be meet and fall in love so he can get back to the future.

programme.title: Back To The Future II
programme.desc: Marty McFly returns, this time travelling forward to 2015 with wacky Doc Brown to save his kids. Their crazy time-travels have a mind-bending effect on history.
This film is a ferocious retelling of the ancient Battle of Thermopylae, depicting the titanic clash in which King Leonidas and 300 Spartans fought Xerxes and his massive Persian army to the death.

programme.title: Batman Begins
programme.desc: Bruce Wayne returns to Gotham and unveils his alter-ego: Batman, a masked crusader who uses his strength, intellect, and high-tech deceptions to fight the sinister forces that threaten the city.

programme.title: Star Trek Beyond
programme.desc: Dispatched on a rescue mission to the farthest reaches of space, Captain Kirk, Spock and the crew become separated when they are ambushed with no means of escape.

programme.title: Elysium
programme.desc: The wealthy live in luxury on a space station while the rest fight for scraps on a ruined Earth. Then one man is given an opportunity to even the score.

programme.title: A Knight's Tale
programme.desc: A squire with a gift for jousting convinces the great Geoffrey Chaucer to forge papers that will pass him off as a romantic knight.

programme.title: Godzilla vs. Kong
programme.desc: Fearsome monsters Godzilla and King Kong square off in an epic battle for the ages, while humanity looks to wipe out both of the creatures and take back the planet once and for all.

programme.title: The Kingdom
programme.desc: FBI agents sent to Saudi Arabia to nab a mass murderer team up with their Arab counterparts in a do-or-die mission for unlikely allies.

programme.title: The Dark Tower
programme.desc: Roland Deschain and the Man in Black share an ancient vendetta: they must fight to the death in an epic battle over the fate of the universe.

programme.title: Spider-Man
programme.desc: After a radioactive spider bite, a nerdy teen develops keen senses and amazing strength.

programme.title: Jack Reacher
programme.desc: A military cop becomes involved in a deadly game of cat-and-mouse when five people are randomly murdered by a sniper.

programme.title: Imagine That
programme.desc: This family comedy follows a financier who cannot connect with his daughter, that is until he enters her imaginary world of dragons and princesses, but will it really change his attitude?

programme.title: The House Bunny
programme.desc: When a bunny is evicted from the Playboy mansion, she hops into the dying Zeta sorority house. Her tutorials in sexy charm make the girls more popular than ever.

programme.title: Benchwarmers 2: Breaking Balls
programme.desc: After his big league dreams are crushed, Ben McGrath is reluctant to take another swing at redemption for his boss' law firm softball team.

programme.title: Galaxy Quest
programme.desc: The alumni cast of a cult space TV show have to play their roles as the real thing when an alien race needs their help.

programme.title: Paul
programme.desc: Two guys accidentally meet an alien named Paul, who brings them on an insane road trip that alters their universe forever. They hatch a fumbling escape plan to return Paul to his mother ship.

programme.title: Spanglish
programme.desc: For John Clasky, life as a celebrity chef means balancing a high-profile career and raising a family. Hiring a housekeeper from Mexico, he quickly learns it may be his life that needs translation.

programme.title: Tour de Pharmacy
programme.desc: In 1982, during a dark and fictitious time in cycling history, the sport's time-honoured race was marred by the doping of virtually all of its competitors.

programme.title: Mr. Deeds
programme.desc: Life flips over for a small-town pizzeria owner and poet who inherits $40 billion. Sleazy moguls come to whisk him and his money away to corporate America.

programme.title: The House Bunny
programme.desc: When a bunny is evicted from the Playboy mansion, she hops into the dying Zeta sorority house. Her tutorials in sexy charm make the girls more popular than ever.

programme.desc: After his big league dreams are crushed, Ben McGrath is reluctant to take another swing at redemption for his boss' law firm softball team.

programme.title: Galaxy Quest
programme.desc: The alumni cast of a cult space TV show have to play their roles as the real thing when an alien race needs their help.

programme.title: Daddy's Home
programme.desc: After trying hard to get his stepchildren to love him and call him Dad, Brad's plans turn upside down when the biological father, Dusty Mayron, returns.

programme.title: Deuce Bigalow: European Gigolo
programme.desc: Deuce's European vacation riot goes from gigolo school in England to Amsterdam. He's on the trail of a killer who's knocking off the city's greatest gigolos.

programme.title: Billy Madison
programme.desc: A 27-year-old spoiled brat must repeat all 12 grades of school - in just 24 weeks - to earn his father's respect and prove he can run the family's multimillion-dollar empire.

programme.title: For Richer, for Poorer
programme.desc: For his wife and son's own good, a millionaire decides to go bankrupt and start over from scratch.

programme.title: Morning Glory
programme.desc: Trouble ensues when a feisty producer attempts to revive a struggling news program with feuding co-hosts.

programme.title: Book of Love
programme.desc: An uptight English writer's book is a failure but a hit in Mexico. When he's invited there to promote it, he discovers his Spanish translator has rewritten his book as an erotic novel.

programme.title: Playing Cupid
programme.desc: A girl sets her single father up with her teacher after starting a matchmaking business for a school project.

programme.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
programme.desc: An unsuspecting man, sidelined when his wife asks for a divorce, is taken under the wing of a younger ladies' man who helps him transform his image.

programme.title: Joy Ride
programme.desc: Audrey's business trip to China goes wrong, so she enlists the aid of her best friend Lolo, Chinese soap star Kat, and Lolo's cousin Deadeye.

programme.title: The Other Boleyn Girl
programme.desc: In this sophisticated and complex study of ambition and deception, the Boleyn sisters vie for the affections of King Henry VIII.

programme.desc: Trouble ensues when a feisty producer attempts to revive a struggling news program with feuding co-hosts.

programme.desc: Stephen Poliakoff's story of the relationship between Elliot, a wealthy Londoner, and Joe, a teenager who tends to Elliot's empty house, and of Elliot's fear that his father was a Nazi.

programme.desc: In this inspiring true story of high school basketball coach, Ken Carter, who benched his winning team in order to teach his players the value of education.

programme.desc: A pilot is selected to attend the Top Gun Naval Flying School while also pursuing a relationship with an instructor.
