programme.desc: Wayne and Garth host the biggest show on local public access TV. Now a sleazy network executive wants to produce a big-budget version. With the help of Wayne's girlfriend, they must battle to save the show.

programme.title: Every Which Way But Loose
programme.desc: Philo Beddoe likes beer, brawling and country music. When he falls for a sexy singer, he sets out to win her with Clyde his orangutan in tow.

programme.title: Foul Play
programme.desc: This bizarre, Hitchcockian comedy sees a kooky divorcee and a bumbling Federal agent take on a posse of Hollywood weirdos planning to assassinate the Pope.

programme.title: Tootsie
programme.desc: An out-of-work actor finds success, love and frustration when he gets the role of his life, playing a woman.

programme.title: Uncle Buck
programme.desc: An idle, good-natured bachelor, Uncle Buck is the last person you would think of to watch the kids. However, during a family crisis, he is suddenly left in charge of his nephew and nieces.

programme.title: Footloose (1984)
programme.desc: In this beloved classic, a Chicago teen ends up in a town where dancing is banned by the local preacher. He then teams up with the preacher's daughter and gets everyone dancin'.

programme.title: Wayne's World
programme.desc: Wayne and Garth host the biggest show on local public access TV. Now a sleazy network executive wants to produce a big-budget version. With the help of Wayne's girlfriend, they must battle to save the show.

programme.title: Stand By Me
programme.desc: In this coming-of-age drama, a group of friends set out on an unforgettable two-day trek to find a missing teenager which turns in to an odyssey of self-discovery.

programme.title: Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon
programme.desc: A magical sword, a notorious assassin, a nobleman's daughter, a breathtaking quest: it adds up to the top foreign language film of all time.

programme.title: Operation Petticoat
programme.desc: During World War II, a commander finds himself stuck with a decrepit (and pink) submarine, a con man executive officer, and a group of army nurses.

programme.title: Father Goose
programme.desc: During WWII, a man persuaded to live on an isolated island and spot aircraft finds himself responsible for a teacher and several students, all female.

programme.title: Stalked by a Prince
programme.desc: Publicist Alyssa thinks she's in a fairytale when she meets a British prince who whisks her away to Europe. Alyssa's dream turns into a nightmare when the prince refuses to let her leave.

programme.title: Who Killed JonBenet?
programme.desc: Revisit the infamous murder of pint-sized beauty queen JonBenet Ramsey and the lurid details that captivated a nation.

programme.title: The Girl Who Wasn't Dead
programme.desc: When 15-year-old Erica vanishes without a trace, authorities believe she may have been the victim of a serial killer.

programme.title: Abducted at an HBCU
programme.desc: College counsellor Ellen becomes concerned when Shannon, a student who's struggling financially, suddenly stops going to classes.

programme.title: Flowers in the Attic
programme.desc: After the death of their father, the four Dollanganger children are convinced by their mother to stay hidden in the attic of their grandparents' mansion so she can reclaim the family fortune.

programme.title: The Man in the Guest House
programme.desc: When a couple converts their garage into a second living space to rent out, they think they've found the perfect source of extra income, but their first renter soon proves to be the worst.

programme.title: She Went Missing
programme.desc: A reporter's long-dormant stalker re-emerges when she returns to her hometown to investigative the disappearance of her childhood best friend.

programme.title: Who Is Killing The Cheerleaders?
programme.desc: Ellie, a former cheerleader, returns to her high school as a teacher 10 years after she was nearly killed in a series of brutal slayings on the squad.

programme.title: My Nightmare Office Affair
programme.desc: Nick is a successful executive with a picture-perfect family, loving wife and adorable daughter. His boss Lisa seduces Nick in his moment of weakness, hoping to remove his wife from the picture.

programme.title: A Deadly Threat to My Family
programme.desc: Marielle becomes suspicious when her sister-in-law escapes from a cult and seeks refuge at her home. When another cult member shows up on her doorstep, she fears her daughter is their next target.

programme.title: Husband, Father, Killer
programme.desc: As a teen, Alyssa has a relationship with abusive Steven, but their path takes a dark turn after she has his child and gives her up for adoption.

programme.title: Murder at the Country Club
programme.desc: An assistant manager finds her life in danger when she uncovers corrupt activities at a prestigious country club.

programme.title: Living With My Mother's Killer
programme.desc: Still reeling from the tragic murder of her mother years ago, Mara forgives the murderer, and allows him to work on her property, only to find that the past is not always past.

programme.title: House of Deadly Lies
programme.desc: A stay at home mother takes in her struggling best friend to help her through a tough time, but soon secrets are revealed that could break her family apart and put everyone in danger.

programme.title: Black Girl Missing
programme.desc: Cheryl's daughter goes missing and is nowhere to be found. Authorities and the media dismiss her as a runaway while they focus on another missing girl, who is white.

programme.title: Abducted on Prom Night
programme.desc: Against her better judgement, a mother allows her troubled daughter to attend prom, but the night turns into a twisted game of cat-and-mouse as the daughter and her friends are taken hostage.

programme.title: NRL All Stars 2020 Indigenous v Maori
programme.desc: The second Women's Indigenous All Stars v Maori All-Stars encounter will be played at CBus Super Stadium on the Gold Coast. In 2019 the Maori side won 8-4, with their forwards leading the way.

programme.title: NRL All Stars 2020 Indigenous v Maori
programme.desc: The Men's All-Stars fixture returns to the Gold Coast, location of the inaugural game in 2010. The Indigenous All-Stars won their first contest against the Maori All-Stars 34-14 in Melbourne last year.

programme.title: NRL Pre Season: Sharks v Warriors
programme.desc: The 2025 Pre-season Challenge begins with the Sharks hosting the Warriors as both sides prepare for Round 1 in Las Vegas.

programme.title: NRL Pre Season: Panthers v Raiders
programme.desc: The Panthers take on the Raiders as new signings & emerging players look to impress before these clubs head to Las Vegas for Round 1.

programme.title: NRL All Stars Women's Indigenous v Maori
programme.desc: The third All Stars game between the Indigenous Women's side and Maori Women's team will be played at Qld Country Bank Stadium in Townsville.

programme.title: NRL All Stars Men's Indigenous v Maori
programme.desc: Qld Country Bank Stadium in Townsville is the venue for the third clash between the Indigenous All Stars and Maori All Stars.

programme.title: NRL: Round 11 Titans v Knights
programme.desc: Super Saturday begins with a matchup between big improvers over the past 3 games. Who continues their 2024 resurgence, Titans or Knights?

programme.title: NRL: Round 11 Sharks v Roosters
programme.desc: The first-placed Sharks had their doubters before rolling Storm in Melbourne. Next up it's the Roosters with Angus Crichton & Sam Walker in red-hot form.

programme.title: NRL: Round 11 Rabbitohs v Cowboys
programme.desc: Who will step up on the big stage of Magic Round for these desperate sides? The Cowboys ended a 7-game losing streak against the Rabbitohs in 2023.

programme.title: NRL: Round 11 Warriors v Panthers
programme.desc: Last year at Magic Round, these sides produced an intense clash won by the Panthers. Can Addin Fonua-Blake inspire the Warriors against the 3-time champs?

programme.title: NRL: Round 11 Storm v Eels
programme.desc: Storm lost their 2nd game of 2024, but welcome back high-flyer Xavier Coates. Can the Eels kickstart their campaign against one of their bitter rivals?

programme.title: NRL: Round 11 Wests Tigers v Dolphins
programme.desc: Magic Round concludes with Hamiso Tabuai-Fidow's return for the 4th-placed Dolphins. Can Wests Tigers avenge their Round 5 loss to Wayne Bennett's team?

programme.title: NRL Pre Season: Panthers v Raiders
programme.desc: The Panthers take on the Raiders as new signings & emerging players look to impress before these clubs head to Las Vegas for Round 1.

programme.title: NRL Pre Season: Sharks v Warriors
programme.desc: The 2025 Pre-season Challenge begins with the Sharks hosting the Warriors as both sides prepare for Round 1 in Las Vegas.

programme.title: NRL All Stars 2022 Maori v Indigenous W
programme.desc: The Maori Women All-Stars hold a 2-1 lead over the Indigenous Women All-Stars after their 24-0 victory in 2021. CommBank Stadium is the venue for the first All Stars game in Sydney.

programme.title: NRL All Stars 2022 Maori v Indigenous
programme.desc: CommBank Stadium in Parramatta is the venue for the fourth clash between the Maori All-Stars and Indigenous All-Stars. The sides are evenly split after a draw in 2021 adding to one win each in the previous two games.

programme.title: NRL All Stars 2023 Maori v Indigenous
programme.desc: Neither of these teams have secured back-to-back wins since their inception. Can the Indigenous All Stars break that streak or will the Maori strike back?

programme.title: NRL All Stars 2023 Maori v Indigenous
programme.desc: A star-studded Indigenous All Stars arrive in Rotorua looking for their first win over the Maori All Stars since 2019.

programme.title: NRL All Stars Indigenous v Maori Women
programme.desc: The All Stars triple header at QCB Stadium in Townsville continues with the Women's game. Can the Maori side make it back-to-back victories against the Indigenous team?

programme.desc: The Panthers take on the Raiders as new signings & emerging players look to impress before these clubs head to Las Vegas for Round 1.

programme.desc: Alex lands a role in a big Hollywood movie, but his part is threatened by a diva-like bull. Alex nearly gives up, but with the help of his friends, learns that no one can bully him out of what he loves to do.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.sub-title: Postman Pat And The Booming Bagpipes
programme.desc: Mrs Goggins is really missing her home town in Scotland. A postcard from her sister hints that a gift's on its way and she's really looking forward to receiving it.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.sub-title: Postman Pat And The Seaside Special

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.sub-title: Postman Pat And The Chinese Dragon

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: There's a dino in the dollhouse! Gabby unboxes a tiny, spongey capsule that grows into a big, spongey dinosaur when she puts it in the Garden pond.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal

programme.title: Little Charley Bear
programme.desc: Charley would love to have a surprise present, so he heads to a surprise present shop to get one, but everything he unwraps, he already has. That is until Bellarina does a surprise dance for him.

programme.title: Little Charley Bear
programme.desc: Charley draws a birthday cake with candles on top because he wants to make a wish. Charley finds that not all wishes turn out how you expect.

programme.title: Little Charley Bear

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild

programme.desc: Gabby and Pandy help the Gabby Cats create unique pieces of artwork in preparation for Baby Box's highly anticipated Meow-seum Day in the dollhouse.

programme.desc: Gabby unboxes an attachment that turns Carlita into an ice cream truck. The Gabby Cats all help out to make ice cream, a menu, and a groovy ice cream truck song.
